title: Jio Platforms is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jio Platforms is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jio Platforms family as a Full Stack Developer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jio Platforms:
Jio Platforms is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms!
